questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 AWS 上托管多人游戏应用程序。该公司希望应用程序能够以亚毫秒级延迟读取数据并对历史数据运行一次性查询。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts a multiplayer gaming application on AWS. The company wants the application to read data with sub-millisecond latency and run one-time queries on historical data. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 将 Amazon RDS 用于经常访问的数据。定期运行自定义脚本以将数据导出到 Amazon S3 存储桶。
A.en: Use Amazon RDS for data that is frequently accessed. Run a periodic custom script to export the data to an Amazon S3 bucket.

B.zh: 将数据直接存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。实施 S3 生命周期策略，将旧数据移至 S3 Glacier Deep Archive 进行长期存储。使用 Amazon Athena 对 Amazon S3 中的数据运行一次性查询。
B.en: Store the data directly in an Amazon S3 bucket. Implement an S3 Lifecycle policy to move older data to S3 Glacier Deep Archive for long-term storage. Run one-time queries on the data in Amazon S3 by using Amazon Athena.

C.zh: 将 Amazon DynamoDB 与 DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 结合使用来处理经常访问的数据。使用 DynamoDB 表导出将数据导出到 Amazon S3 存储桶。使用 Amazon Athena 对 Amazon S3 中的数据运行一次性查询。
C.en: Use Amazon DynamoDB with DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) for data that is frequently accessed. Export the data to an Amazon S3 bucket by using DynamoDB table export. Run one-time queries on the data in Amazon S3 by using Amazon Athena.

D.zh: 将 Amazon DynamoDB 用于经常访问的数据。打开到 Amazon Kinesis Data Streams 的流式传输。使用 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 从 Kinesis Data Streams 读取数据。将记录存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。
D.en: Use Amazon DynamoDB for data that is frequently accessed. Turn on streaming to Amazon Kinesis Data Streams. Use Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose to read the data from Kinesis Data Streams. Store the records in an Amazon S3 bucket.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon RDS虽然可以存储频繁访问的数据，但其查询性能无法满足“亚秒级”的要求。另外，定期导出数据到S3增加了操作的复杂度，不符合“最小操作开销”的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Amazon RDS can store frequently accessed data, its query performance cannot meet the "sub-second" requirements. In addition, regularly exporting data to S3 increases the complexity of the operation and does not meet the requirement of "minimum operation overhead".

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon S3适合存储大量数据，但无法满足“几秒”的要求。 Athena适合运行单个查询，但无法提供实时访问功能。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is suitable for storing large amounts of data, but it cannot meet the requirements of "several seconds". Athena is suitable for running a single query, but it cannot provide real-time access capabilities.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon DynamoDB 与 DAX 结合可以提供“亚秒级”的数据访问能力。 DynamoDB表导出功能可以轻松将数据导出到S3，Athena可以高效地对S3中的历史数据进行查询。这种架构设计满足了低延迟和历史数据查询的需求，同时运行开销较低。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon DynamoDB combined with DAX can provide "sub-second" data access capabilities. The DynamoDB table export function can easily export data to S3, and Athena can efficiently run a query on historical data in S3. This architectural design meets the needs of low latency and historical data query, and at the same time has low operating overhead.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然DynamoDB可以提供低延迟访问，但Kinesis Data Streams和Kinesis Data Firehose的引入增加了架构的复杂性和操作开销，并不能满足“最小操作开销”的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although DynamoDB can provide low latency access, the introduction of Kinesis Data Streams and Kinesis Data Firehose increases the complexity of the architecture and operation overhead, and does not meet the requirement of "minimum operation overhead".

answer_text.zh: C. 将 Amazon DynamoDB 与 DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) 结合使用来处理经常访问的数据。使用 DynamoDB 表导出将数据导出到 Amazon S3 存储桶。使用 Amazon Athena 对 Amazon S3 中的数据运行一次性查询。
answer_text.en: C. Use Amazon DynamoDB with DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) for data that is frequently accessed. Export the data to an Amazon S3 bucket by using DynamoDB table export. Run one-time queries on the data in Amazon S3 by using Amazon Athena.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon DynamoDB 与 DAX 结合可以提供“亚秒级”的数据访问能力。 DynamoDB表导出功能可以轻松将数据导出到S3，Athena可以高效地对S3中的历史数据进行查询。这种架构设计满足了低延迟和历史数据查询的需求，同时运行开销较低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon DynamoDB combined with DAX can provide "sub-second" data access capabilities. The DynamoDB table export function can easily export data to S3, and Athena can efficiently run a query on historical data in S3. This architectural design meets the needs of low latency and historical data query, and at the same time has low operating overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司使用的支付处理系统要求按照发送消息的顺序接收特定支付 ID 的消息。否则，付款可能会被错误处理。解决方案架构师应该采取哪些行动来满足此要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company uses a payment processing system that requires messages for a particular payment ID to be received in the same order that they were sent. Otherwise, the payments might be processed incorrectly. Which actions should a solutions architect take to meet this requirement? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用付款 ID 作为分区键将消息写入 Amazon DynamoDB 表。
A.en: Write the messages to an Amazon DynamoDB table with the payment ID as the partition key.

B.zh: 使用付款 ID 作为分区键将消息写入 Amazon Kinesis 数据流。
B.en: Write the messages to an Amazon Kinesis data stream with the payment ID as the partition key.

C.zh: 使用付款 ID 作为键将消息写入 Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached 集群。
C.en: Write the messages to an Amazon ElastiCache for Memcached cluster with the payment ID as the key.

D.zh: 将消息写入 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 队列。设置消息属性以使用付款 ID。
D.en: Write the messages to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Set the message attribute to use the payment ID.

E.zh: 将消息写入 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 队列。设置消息组以使用付款 ID。
E.en: Write the messages to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Set the message group to use the payment ID.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：DynamoDB 是一个 NoSQL 数据库。虽然它可以使用分区键来组织数据，但它不保证消息的顺序。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: DynamoDB is a NoSQL database. Although it can use partition keys to organize data, it does not guarantee the order of messages.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Kinesis data flow 支持分区键，可以保证同一分区内消息的顺序。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Kinesis data flow supports partition keys, which can ensure the order of messages within the same partition.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：ElastiCache for Memcached 是内存中缓存服务，不适合处理消息队列或保证消息顺序。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: ElastiCache for Memcached is an in-memory caching service and is not suitable for handling message queues or guaranteeing message order.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：普通的SQS队列不保证消息的顺序，即使设置了消息属性。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Ordinary SQS queues do not guarantee the order of messages, even if message properties are set.

E.zh: 正確。技术原因：SQS FIFO队列支持消息组，可以保证同一组内消息的顺序。
E.en: Correct. Technical reason: SQS FIFO queue supports message groups, which can ensure the order of messages within the same group.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用付款 ID 作为分区键将消息写入 Amazon Kinesis 数据流。；E. 将消息写入 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 队列。设置消息组以使用付款 ID。
answer_text.en: B. Write the messages to an Amazon Kinesis data stream with the payment ID as the partition key.; E. Write the messages to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queue. Set the message group to use the payment ID.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BE (85%) Other。热门讨论与考点摘要：Kinesis data flow 支持分区键，可以保证同一分区内消息的顺序。；SQS FIFO队列支持消息组，可以保证同一组内消息的顺序。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BE (85%) Other. Popular discussion and key point summary: Kinesis data flow supports partition keys, which can ensure the order of messages within the same partition.; SQS FIFO queue supports message groups, which can ensure the order of messages within the same group.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在构建一个游戏系统，该系统需要同时将独特的事件发送到单独的排行榜、匹配和身份验证服务。该公司需要一个 AWS 事件驱动系统来保证事件的顺序。哪种解决方案可以满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is building a game system that needs to send unique events to separate leaderboard, matchmaking, and authentication services concurrently. The company needs an AWS event-driven system that guarantees the order of the events. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: Amazon EventBridge 事件总线
A.en: Amazon EventBridge event bus

B.zh: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) FIFO 主题
B.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) FIFO topics

C.zh: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) 标准主题
C.en: Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) standard topics

D.zh: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO 队列
D.en: Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) FIFO queues

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：EventBridge是一个事件总线服务，可以在事件驱动架构中使用，但它不保证事件的顺序。因此，该选项不符合问题中“保证事件发生顺序”的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: EventBridge is an event bus service that can be used in event-driven architecture, but it does not guarantee the order of events. Therefore, this option does not meet the requirement of "guaranteing the order of events" in the question.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：SNS FIFO 主题支持事件的顺序性质，并且可以将事件分发给多个订阅者（例如服务）。该选项满足问题中“保证事件的顺序”和“分发到多个服务”的要求。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: SNS FIFO topics support the sequential nature of events and can distribute events to multiple subscribers (such as services). This option meets the requirements of "guaranteing the order of events" and "distributing to multiple services" in the question.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：SNS 标准主题支持将事件分发给多个订阅者，但不保证事件的顺序。因此，该选项不符合问题中“保证事件发生顺序”的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: SNS standard topics support event distribution to multiple subscribers, but do not guarantee the order of events. Therefore, this option does not meet the requirement of "guaranteing the order of events" in the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：SQS FIFO队列支持事件的顺序性，但它是点对点的消息队列服务，无法将事件分发到多个服务。因此，该选项不满足问题中“分发到多个服务”的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The SQS FIFO queue supports the sequential nature of events, but it is a point-to-point message queue service and cannot distribute events to multiple services. Therefore, this option does not meet the requirement of "distribute to multiple services" in the question.

answer_text.zh: B. Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) FIFO 主题
answer_text.en: B. Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) FIFO topics

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (79%) D (16%) 5%。热门讨论与考点摘要：SNS FIFO 主题支持事件的顺序性质，并且可以将事件分发给多个订阅者（例如服务）。该选项满足问题中“保证事件的顺序”和“分发到多个服务”的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (79%) D (16%) 5%. Popular discussion and key point summary: SNS FIFO topics support the sequential nature of events and can distribute events to multiple subscribers (such as services). This option meets the requirements of "guaranteing the order of events" and "distributing to multiple services" in the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家医院正在设计一种新的应用程序，用于收集患者的症状。该医院决定在架构中使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 和 Amazon Simple notification Service (Amazon SNS)。解决方案架构师正在审查基础设施设计。数据在静态和传输过程中必须进行加密。只有医院的授权人员才能访问数据。解决方案架构师应该采取哪些步骤组合来满足这些要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A hospital is designing a new application that gathers symptoms from patients. The hospital has decided to use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) and Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS) in the architecture. A solutions architect is reviewing the infrastructure design. Data must be encrypted at rest and in transit. Only authorized personnel of the hospital should be able to access the data. Which combination of steps should the solutions architect take to meet these requirements? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 在 SQS 组件上打开服务器端加密。更新默认密钥策略以将密钥的使用限制为一组授权主体。
A.en: Turn on server-side encryption on the SQS components. Update the default key policy to restrict key usage to a set of authorized principals.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客户托管密钥在 SNS 组件上启用服务器端加密。应用密钥策略将密钥的使用限制为一组授权主体。
B.en: Turn on server-side encryption on the SNS components by using an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Apply a key policy to restrict key usage to a set of authorized principals.

C.zh: 打开 SNS 组件上的加密。更新默认密钥策略以将密钥的使用限制为一组授权主体。在主题策略中设置条件以仅允许通过 TLS 进行加密连接。
C.en: Turn on encryption on the SNS components. Update the default key policy to restrict key usage to a set of authorized principals. Set a condition in the topic policy to allow only encrypted connections over TLS.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客户托管密钥在 SQS 组件上启用服务器端加密。应用密钥策略将密钥的使用限制为一组授权主体。在队列策略中设置条件以仅允许通过 TLS 的加密连接。
D.en: Turn on server-side encryption on the SQS components by using an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Apply a key policy to restrict key usage to a set of authorized principals. Set a condition in the queue policy to allow only encrypted connections over TLS.

E.zh: 使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客户托管密钥在 SQS 组件上启用服务器端加密。应用 IAM 策略将密钥的使用限制为一组授权主体。在队列策略中设置条件以仅允许通过 TLS 的加密连接。
E.en: Turn on server-side encryption on the SQS components by using an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Apply an IAM policy to restrict key usage to a set of authorized principals. Set a condition in the queue policy to allow only encrypted connections over TLS.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：启用服务器端加密是正确的，但使用认证加密策略可能不够安全。该问题需要使用客户管理的密钥而不是识别密钥。结论：错误。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Enabling server-side encryption is correct, but using the authentication encryption strategy may not be secure enough. The question requires the use of a Customer Managed Key instead of a recognition key. Conclusion: Wrong.

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析：启用服务器端加密并使用客户托管加密满足问题要求。 Dapi限制访问权限的秘密策略也是正确的做法。结论：正确。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Enabling server-side encryption and using customer-hosted encryption meet the requirements of the question. Dapi's secret strategy of restricting access rights is also the right approach. Conclusion: Correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：启用加密是正确的，但问题需要使用客户管理的密钥而不是公认的密钥。设置允许加密连接的条件是正确的，但此选项没有提及使用 KMS 客户端托管的密钥。结论：错误。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Enabling encryption is correct, but the question requires the use of customer-managed keys instead of recognized keys. Setting conditions to allow encrypted connections is correct, but this option makes no mention of using KMS client-hosted keys. Conclusion: Wrong.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析：启用服务器端加密并使用客户托管加密满足问题要求。 Dapi限制访问权限的秘密策略也是正确的做法。设置允许加密连接的条件，以满足问题要求。结论：正确。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Enabling server-side encryption and using customer-hosted encryption meet the requirements of the question. Dapi's secret strategy of restricting access rights is also the right approach. Set conditions to allow encrypted connections to meet the question requirements. Conclusion: Correct.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：启用服务器端加密并使用客户托管加密满足问题要求。但与使用密钥策略相比，使用 IAM 策略来限制密钥使用的安全性和一致性较差。结论：错误。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: Enabling server-side encryption and using customer-hosted encryption meet the requirements of the question. But using IAM policies to restrict key usage is less secure and consistent with best practices than using Key Policy. Conclusion: Wrong.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客户托管密钥在 SNS 组件上启用服务器端加密。应用密钥策略将密钥的使用限制为一组授权主体。；D. 使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客户托管密钥在 SQS 组件上启用服务器端加密。应用密钥策略将密钥的使用限制为一组授权主体。在队列策略中设置条件以仅允许通过 TLS 的加密连接。
answer_text.en: B. Turn on server-side encryption on the SNS components by using an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Apply a key policy to restrict key usage to a set of authorized principals.; D. Turn on server-side encryption on the SQS components by using an AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed key. Apply a key policy to restrict key usage to a set of authorized principals. Set a condition in the queue policy to allow only encrypted connections over TLS.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：BD (68%) CD (24%) 7%。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析：启用服务器端加密并使用客户托管加密满足问题要求。 Dapi限制访问权限的秘密策略也是正确的做法。结论：正确。；技术分析：启用服务器端加密并使用客户托管加密满足问题要求。 Dapi限制访问权限的秘密策略也是正确的做法。设置允许加密连接的条件，以满足问题要求。结论：正确。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BD (68%) CD (24%) 7%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: Enabling server-side encryption and using customer-hosted encryption meet the requirements of the question. Dapi's secret strategy of restricting access rights is also the right approach. Conclusion: Correct.; Technical analysis: Enabling server-side encryption and using customer-hosted encryption meet the requirements of the question. Dapi's secret strategy of restricting access rights is also the right approach. Set conditions to allow encrypted connections to meet the question requirements. Conclusion: Correct.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司运行由 Amazon RDS 支持的 Web 应用程序。一位新的数据库管理员因意外编辑数据库表中的信息而导致数据丢失。为了帮助从此类事件中恢复，该公司希望能够将数据库恢复到过去 30 天内发生任何更改之前 5 分钟的状态。解决方案架构师应该在设计中包含哪些功能来满足此要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a web application that is backed by Amazon RDS. A new database administrator caused data loss by accidentally editing information in a database table. To help recover from this type of incident, the company wants the ability to restore the database to its state from 5 minutes before any change within the last 30 days. Which feature should the solutions architect include in the design to meet this requirement?

A.zh: 读取副本
A.en: Read replicas

B.zh: 手动快照
B.en: Manual snapshots

C.zh: 自动备份Automated backups
C.en: Automated backups

D.zh: 多可用区部署
D.en: Multi-AZ deployments

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：只读副本用于提高数据库的读取性能，分担主数据库的负载，但不提供数据恢复到特定时间点的功能。因此这个选项是错误的。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: The read replica is used to improve the read performance of the database and share the load of the primary database, but it does not provide the function of data recovery to a specific point in time. Therefore this option is wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：手动快照是用户手动创建的数据库备份，可用于恢复数据。但手动快照无法满足问题中“恢复到5分钟前的状态”的要求，因为它需要用户主动创建快照，无法提供持续的时间点恢复功能。因此这个选项是错误的。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Manual snapshots are database backups created manually by users that can be used to restore data. However, manual snapshots cannot meet the requirement of "restoring to the state 5 minutes ago" in the question, because it requires users to actively create snapshots and cannot provide continuous point-in-time recovery functionality. Therefore this option is wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：自动备份是Amazon RDS提供的一项功能，支持连续时间点恢复（Point-in-Time Recovery），可以恢复到过去30天内的任意时间点。这完全符合题目要求，故此选项正确。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Automatic backup is a function provided by Amazon RDS, which supports continuous point-in-time recovery (Point-in-Time Recovery) and can be restored to any point in time within the past 30 days. This fully meets the question requirements, so this option is correct.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：多AZ部署用于提高数据库的高可用和容错能力，但不提供数据恢复到特定时间点的功能。因此这个选项是错误的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Multi-AZ deployment is used to improve the high availability and fault tolerance of the database, but it does not provide the function of data recovery to a specific point in time. Therefore this option is wrong.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：自动备份是Amazon RDS提供的一项功能，支持连续时间点恢复（Point-in-Time Recovery），可以恢复到过去30天内的任意时间点。这完全符合题目要求，故此选项正确。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Automatic backup is a function provided by Amazon RDS, which supports continuous point-in-time recovery (Point-in-Time Recovery) and can be restored to any point in time within the past 30 days. This fully meets the question requirements, so this option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 公司的 Web 应用程序由 AWS Lambda 函数前面的 Amazon API Gateway API 和 Amazon DynamoDB 数据库组成。 Lambda 函数处理业务逻辑，DynamoDB 表托管数据。该应用程序使用 Amazon Cognito 用户池来识别应用程序的各个用户。解决方案架构师需要更新应用程序，以便只有订阅的用户才能访问优质内容。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这一要求？
question_text.en: A company’s web application consists of an Amazon API Gateway API in front of an AWS Lambda function and an Amazon DynamoDB database. The Lambda function handles the business logic, and the DynamoDB table hosts the data. The application uses Amazon Cognito user pools to identify the individual users of the application. A solutions architect needs to update the application so that only users who have a subscription can access premium content. Which solution will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 在 API Gateway API 上启用 API 缓存和限制。
A.en: Enable API caching and throttling on the API Gateway API.

B.zh: 在 API Gateway API 上设置 AWS WAF。创建规则来过滤拥有订阅的用户。
B.en: Set up AWS WAF on the API Gateway API. Create a rule to filter users who have a subscription.

C.zh: 将细粒度 IAM 权限应用于 DynamoDB 表中的高级内容。
C.en: Apply fine-grained IAM permissions to the premium content in the DynamoDB table.

D.zh: 实施 API 使用计划和 API 密钥，以限制没有订阅的用户的访问。
D.en: Implement API usage plans and API keys to limit the access of users who do not have a subscription.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：API缓存和限流主要用于优化性能和控制流量，而不是限制用户访问特定内容。此选项不能满足“仅限订阅者访问优质内容”的需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: API caching and throttling are mainly used to optimize performance and control traffic, rather than restricting users from accessing specific content. This option does not satisfy the need for "subscriber-only access to premium content".

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS WAF主要用于保护API免受恶意流量攻击，而不是基于用户订阅状态进行访问控制。创建规则来过滤订阅用户既复杂又昂贵。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS WAF is primarily used to protect APIs from malicious traffic attacks, rather than for access control based on user subscription status. Creating rules to filter subscribed users is complex and expensive.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：IAM权限可以控制对DynamoDB表的访问，但不能直接根据用户订阅状态进行动态控制。实现此功能需要额外的逻辑和操作开销。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: IAM permissions can control access to DynamoDB tables, but cannot be dynamically controlled directly based on user subscription status. Implementing this functionality requires additional logic and operational overhead.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：API使用计划和API密钥是API网关的内置功能，可以轻松实现基于订阅状态的访问控制。该方案运行开销最低，直接满足问题的需求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: API usage plans and API keys are built-in features of API Gateway, making it easy to implement access control based on subscription status. This solution has the lowest operating overhead and directly meets the needs of the question.

answer_text.zh: D. 实施 API 使用计划和 API 密钥，以限制没有订阅的用户的访问。
answer_text.en: D. Implement API usage plans and API keys to limit the access of users who do not have a subscription.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (86%) 14%。热门讨论与考点摘要：API使用计划和API密钥是API网关的内置功能，可以轻松实现基于订阅状态的访问控制。该方案运行开销最低，直接满足问题的需求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (86%) 14%. Popular discussion and key point summary: API usage plans and API keys are built-in features of API Gateway, making it easy to implement access control based on subscription status. This solution has the lowest operating overhead and directly meets the needs of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在使用 Amazon Route 53 基于延迟的路由将世界各地用户的请求路由到其基于 UDP 的应用程序。该应用程序托管在该公司位于美国、亚洲和欧洲的本地数据中心的冗余服务器上。该公司的合规性要求规定应用程序必须在本地托管。该公司希望提高应用程序的性能和可用性。解决方案架构师应该怎样做才能满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is using Amazon Route 53 latency-based routing to route requests to its UDP-based application for users around the world. The application is hosted on redundant servers in the company's on-premises data centers in the United States, Asia, and Europe. The company’s compliance requirements state that the application must be hosted on premises. The company wants to improve the performance and availability of the application. What should a solutions architect do to meet these requirements?

A.zh: 在三个 AWS 区域中配置三个网络负载均衡器 (NLB) 以寻址本地终端节点。使用 AWS Global Accelerator 创建加速器，并将 NLB 注册为其终端节点。使用指向加速器 DNS 的 CNAME 提供对应用程序的访问。
A.en: Configure three Network Load Balancers (NLBs) in the three AWS Regions to address the on-premises endpoints. Create an accelerator by using AWS Global Accelerator, and register the NLBs as its endpoints. Provide access to the application by using a CNAME that points to the accelerator DNS.

B.zh: 在三个 AWS 区域中配置三个 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 以处理本地终端节点。使用 AWS Global Accelerator 创建加速器，并将 ALB 注册为其终端节点。使用指向加速器 DNS 的 CNAME 提供对应用程序的访问。
B.en: Configure three Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in the three AWS Regions to address the on-premises endpoints. Create an accelerator by using AWS Global Accelerator, and register the ALBs as its endpoints. Provide access to the application by using a CNAME that points to the accelerator DNS.

C.zh: 在三个 AWS 区域中配置三个网络负载均衡器 (NLB) 以寻址本地终端节点。在 Route 53 中，创建指向三个 NLB 的基于延迟的记录，并将其用作 Amazon CloudFront 分配的源。使用指向 CloudFront DNS 的 CNAME 提供对应用程序的访问。
C.en: Configure three Network Load Balancers (NLBs) in the three AWS Regions to address the on-premises endpoints. In Route 53, create a latency-based record that points to the three NLBs, and use it as an origin for an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Provide access to the application by using a CNAME that points to the CloudFront DNS.

D.zh: 在三个 AWS 区域中配置三个 Application Load Balancer (ALB) 以处理本地终端节点。在 Route 53 中，创建指向三个 ALB 的基于延迟的记录，并将其用作 Amazon CloudFront 分配的源。使用指向 CloudFront DNS 的 CNAME 提供对应用程序的访问。
D.en: Configure three Application Load Balancers (ALBs) in the three AWS Regions to address the on-premises endpoints. In Route 53, create a latency-based record that points to the three ALBs, and use it as an origin for an Amazon CloudFront distribution. Provide access to the application by using a CNAME that points to the CloudFront DNS.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：分析：使用NLB可以处理UDP流量，满足问题的要求。 AWS Global Accelerator 优化跨区域的性能和可用性，并支持 UDP 协议。通过 CNAME 指向加速器 DNS 是正确的配置方法。该选项完全满足题目要求。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Analysis: Using NLB can handle UDP traffic, which meets the requirements of the question. AWS Global Accelerator optimizes performance and availability across regions and supports UDP protocol. Pointing to the accelerator DNS via CNAME is the correct way to configure it. This option fully meets the question requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：ALB不支持UDP流量，仅支持HTTP/HTTPS协议，因此不满足题目要求。虽然 Global Accelerator 可以优化性能，但 ALB 的协议限制使该选项错误。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: ALB does not support UDP traffic and only supports HTTP/HTTPS protocols, so it does not meet the question requirements. While Global Accelerator can optimize performance, ALB's protocol limitations make this option wrong.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：虽然NLB支持UDP流量，但CloudFront仅支持HTTP/HTTPS协议，不支持UDP流量。 Route 53的延迟路由可以优化性能，但其与CloudFront结合使用并不能满足问题的要求。这个选项是错误的。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: Although NLB supports UDP traffic, CloudFront only supports HTTP/HTTPS protocols and does not support UDP traffic. Route 53's delayed routing can optimize performance, but its use in combination with CloudFront does not meet the requirements of the question. This option is wrong.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：分析：ALB不支持UDP流量，仅支持HTTP/HTTPS协议，因此不满足题目要求。 CloudFront也不支持UDP流量，因此此选项是错误的。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Analysis: ALB does not support UDP traffic and only supports HTTP/HTTPS protocols, so it does not meet the question requirements. CloudFront also doesn't support UDP traffic, so this option is wrong.

answer_text.zh: A. 在三个 AWS 区域中配置三个网络负载均衡器 (NLB) 以寻址本地终端节点。使用 AWS Global Accelerator 创建加速器，并将 NLB 注册为其终端节点。使用指向加速器 DNS 的 CNAME 提供对应用程序的访问。
answer_text.en: A. Configure three Network Load Balancers (NLBs) in the three AWS Regions to address the on-premises endpoints. Create an accelerator by using AWS Global Accelerator, and register the NLBs as its endpoints. Provide access to the application by using a CNAME that points to the accelerator DNS.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (98%) 2%。热门讨论与考点摘要：分析：使用NLB可以处理UDP流量，满足问题的要求。 AWS Global Accelerator 优化跨区域的性能和可用性，并支持 UDP 协议。通过 CNAME 指向加速器 DNS 是正确的配置方法。该选项完全满足题目要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (98%) 2%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Analysis: Using NLB can handle UDP traffic, which meets the requirements of the question. AWS Global Accelerator optimizes performance and availability across regions and supports UDP protocol. Pointing to the accelerator DNS via CNAME is the correct way to configure it. This option fully meets the question requirements.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解决方案架构师希望所有新用户都有特定的复杂性要求和 IAM 用户密码的强制轮换期。解决方案架构师应该做什么来实现这一目标？
question_text.en: A solutions architect wants all new users to have specific complexity requirements and mandatory rotation periods for IAM user passwords. What should the solutions architect do to accomplish this?

A.zh: 为整个 AWS 账户设置总体密码策略。
A.en: Set an overall password policy for the entire AWS account.

B.zh: 为 AWS 账户中的每个 IAM 用户设置密码策略。
B.en: Set a password policy for each IAM user in the AWS account.

C.zh: 使用第三方供应商软件设置密码要求。
C.en: Use third-party vendor software to set password requirements.

D.zh: 将 Amazon CloudWatch 规则附加到 Create_newuser 事件，以根据适当的要求设置密码。
D.en: Attach an Amazon CloudWatch rule to the Create_newuser event to set the password with the appropriate requirements.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：正确。 AWS 允许在账户级别设置密码策略，这可确保所有 IAM 用户遵循统一的密码复杂性要求和轮换策略。这是推荐的最佳实践，因为它可以简化管理并提高安全性。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: Correct. AWS allows setting password policies at the account level, which ensures that all IAM users follow uniform password complexity requirements and rotation policies. This is a recommended best practice because it simplifies administration and improves security.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 AWS 不支持为单个 IAM 用户设置独立的密码策略。密码策略只能在账户级别设置。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. AWS does not support setting independent password policies for individual IAM users. Password policy can only be set at the account level.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。虽然可以使用第三方工具来管理密码，但这并不是AWS推荐的解决方案，也不符合问题所要求的“直接在AWS中实现”的要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. Although it is possible to use third-party tools to manage passwords, this is not a solution recommended by AWS, nor does it meet the requirement of "implementation directly in AWS" as required by the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：错误。 CloudWatch规则直接设置密码策略，没有任何规则。该选项不符合问题要求，也不是 AWS 推荐的实用方法。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Error. CloudWatch rules directly set password policies without any rules. This option does not meet the question requirements and is not a practical method recommended by AWS.

answer_text.zh: A. 为整个 AWS 账户设置总体密码策略。
answer_text.en: A. Set an overall password policy for the entire AWS account.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (96%) 4%。热门讨论与考点摘要：正确。 AWS 允许在账户级别设置密码策略，这可确保所有 IAM 用户遵循统一的密码复杂性要求和轮换策略。这是推荐的最佳实践，因为它可以简化管理并提高安全性。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (96%) 4%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Correct. AWS allows setting password policies at the account level, which ensures that all IAM users follow uniform password complexity requirements and rotation policies. This is a recommended best practice because it simplifies administration and improves security.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司已将应用程序迁移到 Amazon EC2 Linux 实例。其中一个 EC2 实例按计划运行多个 1 小时的任务。这些任务是由不同的团队编写的，没有通用的编程语言。该公司担心这些任务在单个实例上运行时的性能和可扩展性。解决方案架构师需要实施一个解决方案来解决这些问题。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has migrated an application to Amazon EC2 Linux instances. One of these EC2 instances runs several 1-hour tasks on a schedule. These tasks were written by different teams and have no common programming language. The company is concerned about performance and scalability while these tasks run on a single instance. A solutions architect needs to implement a solution to resolve these concerns. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Batch 将任务作为作业运行。使用 Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) 安排作业。
A.en: Use AWS Batch to run the tasks as jobs. Schedule the jobs by using Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events).

B.zh: 将 EC2 实例转换为容器。使用 AWS App Runner 按需创建容器以将任务作为作业运行。
B.en: Convert the EC2 instance to a container. Use AWS App Runner to create the container on demand to run the tasks as jobs.

C.zh: 将任务复制到 AWS Lambda 函数中。使用 Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) 计划 Lambda 函数。
C.en: Copy the tasks into AWS Lambda functions. Schedule the Lambda functions by using Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events).

D.zh: 创建运行任务的 EC2 实例的 Amazon 系统映像 (AMI)。使用 AMI 创建 Auto Scaling 组以运行实例的多个副本。
D.en: Create an Amazon Machine Image (AMI) of the EC2 instance that runs the tasks. Create an Auto Scaling group with the AMI to run multiple copies of the instance.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Batch 是专门为运行批处理任务而设计的服务。它支持多种编程语言和任务类型，可以高效管理资源并提供自动扩展能力。 Amazon EventBridge 可以轻松安排任务并减少运维开销。此选项满足性能和可扩展性要求，同时具有最小的运营开销。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Batch is a service specially designed for running batch processing tasks. It supports multiple programming languages and task types, can manage resources efficiently and provide automatic expansion capabilities. Amazon EventBridge can easily schedule tasks and reduce operation and maintenance overhead. This option meets performance and scalability requirements while having minimal operational overhead.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS App Runner 主要用于运行 Web 应用程序或 API，而不是批处理任务。将 EC2 实例转换为容器需要额外的开发工作并增加运营开销。该选项不适合解决当前问题。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS App Runner is primarily used to run web applications or APIs, not batch processing tasks. Converting EC2 instances to containers requires additional development work and adds operational overhead. This option is not suitable for solving the current problem.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然AWS Lambda可以通过EventBridge运行任务并调度它们，但Lambda函数有运行时间限制（最长15分钟），不适合运行1小时的任务。另外，将任务迁移到Lambda需要重写代码，增加了开发和运维开销。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although AWS Lambda can run tasks and schedule them through EventBridge, Lambda functions have a running time limit (maximum 15 minutes) and are not suitable for running tasks for 1 hour. In addition, migrating tasks to Lambda requires rewriting the code, which increases development and operation and maintenance overhead.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Auto Scaling虽然可以扩展EC2实例，但是这种方式解决了任务调度的问题。运行多个实例会增加成本和管理复杂性，并且运营开销很高。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Auto Scaling can expand EC2 instances, this method solves the problem of task scheduling. Running multiple instances increases cost and management complexity, and the operational overhead is high.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Batch 将任务作为作业运行。使用 Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events) 安排作业。
answer_text.en: A. Use AWS Batch to run the tasks as jobs. Schedule the jobs by using Amazon EventBridge (Amazon CloudWatch Events).

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：A (71%) C (17%) 10%。热门讨论与考点摘要：AWS Batch 是专门为运行批处理任务而设计的服务。它支持多种编程语言和任务类型，可以高效管理资源并提供自动扩展能力。 Amazon EventBridge 可以轻松安排任务并减少运维开销。此选项满足性能和可扩展性要求，同时具有最小的运营开销。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (71%) C (17%) 10%. Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Batch is a service specially designed for running batch processing tasks. It supports multiple programming languages and task types, can manage resources efficiently and provide automatic expansion capabilities. Amazon EventBridge can easily schedule tasks and reduce operation and maintenance overhead. This option meets performance and scalability requirements while having minimal operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 VPC 中运行公共三层 Web 应用程序。该应用程序在跨多个可用区的 Amazon EC2 实例上运行。在私有子网中运行的 EC2 实例需要通过 Internet 与许可证服务器进行通信。该公司需要一个可最大限度减少运营维护的托管解决方案。哪种解决方案满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a public three-tier web application in a VPC. The application runs on Amazon EC2 instances across multiple Availability Zones. The EC2 instances that run in private subnets need to communicate with a license server over the internet. The company needs a managed solution that minimizes operational maintenance. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 在公有子网中配置 NAT 实例。使用指向 NAT 实例的默认路由修改每个私有子网的路由表。
A.en: Provision a NAT instance in a public subnet. Modify each private subnet's route table with a default route that points to the NAT instance.

B.zh: 在私有子网中配置 NAT 实例。使用指向 NAT 实例的默认路由修改每个私有子网的路由表。
B.en: Provision a NAT instance in a private subnet. Modify each private subnet's route table with a default route that points to the NAT instance.

C.zh: 在公有子网中配置 NAT 网关。使用指向 NAT 网关的默认路由修改每个私有子网的路由表。
C.en: Provision a NAT gateway in a public subnet. Modify each private subnet's route table with a default route that points to the NAT gateway.

D.zh: 在私有子网中配置 NAT 网关。使用指向 NAT 网关的默认路由修改每个私有子网的路由表。
D.en: Provision a NAT gateway in a private subnet. Modify each private subnet's route table with a default route that points to the NAT gateway.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：NAT实例可以实现私有子网与互联网的通信，但需要主动管理（如实例启动、监控、扩容等），因此不符合“管理解决方案，减少运维工作”的要求。结论：错误。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: A NAT instance can realize communication between a private subnet and the Internet, but it requires active management (such as instance startup, monitoring, expansion, etc.), so it does not meet the requirements of "managing solutions and reducing operation and maintenance work". Conclusion: Wrong.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：NAT实例必须部署在公有子网中才能访问Internet。如果部署在私有子网中，则无法与 Internet 通信，因此该选项在技术上不可行。结论：错误。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: NAT instances must be deployed in a public subnet to access the Internet. If deployed in a private subnet, it cannot communicate with the Internet, so this option is not technically feasible. Conclusion: Wrong.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：技术分析：NAT网关是托管服务，由AWS负责管理和维护。需要部署在公有子网中，并通过路由表配置私有子网的默认路由指向NAT网关。这是最佳实践，符合问题的要求。结论：正确。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Technical analysis: NAT gateway is a managed service, and AWS is responsible for management and maintenance. It needs to be deployed in the public subnet and configure the default route of the private subnet to point to the NAT gateway through the routing table. This is best practice and meets the requirements of the question. Conclusion: Correct.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：技术分析：NAT网关必须部署在公网子网中才能访问Internet。如果部署在私有子网中，则无法与 Internet 通信，因此该选项在技术上不可行。结论：错误。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Technical analysis: NAT gateway must be deployed in a public subnet to access the Internet. If deployed in a private subnet, it cannot communicate with the Internet, so this option is not technically feasible. Conclusion: Wrong.

answer_text.zh: C. 在公有子网中配置 NAT 网关。使用指向 NAT 网关的默认路由修改每个私有子网的路由表。
answer_text.en: C. Provision a NAT gateway in a public subnet. Modify each private subnet's route table with a default route that points to the NAT gateway.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：C (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：技术分析：NAT网关是托管服务，由AWS负责管理和维护。需要部署在公有子网中，并通过路由表配置私有子网的默认路由指向NAT网关。这是最佳实践，符合问题的要求。结论：正确。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Technical analysis: NAT gateway is a managed service, and AWS is responsible for management and maintenance. It needs to be deployed in the public subnet and configure the default route of the private subnet to point to the NAT gateway through the routing table. This is best practice and meets the requirements of the question. Conclusion: Correct.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司需要创建 Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) 集群来托管数字媒体流应用程序。 EKS 集群将使用由 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 卷支持的托管节点组进行存储。公司必须使用存储在 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 中的客户托管密钥对所有静态数据进行加密。哪种操作组合能够以最少的运营开销满足此要求？ （选择两个。）
question_text.en: A company needs to create an Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (Amazon EKS) cluster to host a digital media streaming application. The EKS cluster will use a managed node group that is backed by Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) volumes for storage. The company must encrypt all data at rest by using a customer managed key that is stored in AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS). Which combination of actions will meet this requirement with the LEAST operational overhead? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 使用 Kubernetes 插件，该插件使用客户管理的密钥来执行数据加密。
A.en: Use a Kubernetes plugin that uses the customer managed key to perform data encryption.

B.zh: 创建 EKS 集群后，找到 EBS 卷。使用客户管理的密钥启用加密。
B.en: After creation of the EKS cluster, locate the EBS volumes. Enable encryption by using the customer managed key.

C.zh: 默认情况下，在将创建 EKS 集群的 AWS 区域中启用 EBS 加密。选择客户管理的密钥作为默认密钥。
C.en: Enable EBS encryption by default in the AWS Region where the EKS cluster will be created. Select the customer managed key as the default key.

D.zh: 创建 EKS 集群。创建一个 IAM 角色，该角色具有向客户托管密钥授予权限的策略。将角色与 EKS 集群关联。
D.en: Create the EKS cluster. Create an IAM role that has a policy that grants permission to the customer managed key. Associate the role with the EKS cluster.

E.zh: 将客户管理的密钥作为 Kubernetes 密钥存储在 EKS 集群中。使用客户管理的密钥加密 EBS 卷。
E.en: Store the customer managed key as a Kubernetes secret in the EKS cluster. Use the customer managed key to encrypt the EBS volumes.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然可以使用 Kubernetes 插件来实现加密，但这会增加额外的操作开销，不符合“最小化操作开销”的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although it is possible to use Kubernetes plugins to implement encryption, this will add additional operational overhead and does not meet the requirement of "minimizing operational overhead".

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：手动定位EBS卷并启用加密需要额外的步骤，增加了操作开销，并且不满足问题要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Manually locating the EBS volume and enabling encryption requires additional steps, increases operational overhead, and does not meet the question requirements.

C.zh: 正確。技术原因：启用 EBS 默认加密并选择客户管理的密钥作为默认密钥是一种自动化解决方案，可减少运营开销。
C.en: Correct. Technical reason: Enabling EBS default encryption and selecting customer-managed keys as default keys is an automated solution that reduces operational overhead.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：为 EKS 集群创建 IAM 角色并授予对客户管理密钥的访问权限是启用加密而不增加额外操作开销的必要步骤。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Creating an IAM role for the EKS cluster and granting access to customer-managed keys are necessary steps to enable encryption without adding additional operational overhead.

E.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：将密钥存储为 Kubernetes 机密并手动加密 EBS 卷会增加操作复杂性，不符合“最小化操作开销”的要求。
E.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Storing keys as Kubernetes secrets and manually encrypting EBS volumes increases operational complexity and does not meet the requirement of "minimizing operational overhead."

answer_text.zh: C. 默认情况下，在将创建 EKS 集群的 AWS 区域中启用 EBS 加密。选择客户管理的密钥作为默认密钥。；D. 创建 EKS 集群。创建一个 IAM 角色，该角色具有向客户托管密钥授予权限的策略。将角色与 EKS 集群关联。
answer_text.en: C. Enable EBS encryption by default in the AWS Region where the EKS cluster will be created. Select the customer managed key as the default key.; D. Create the EKS cluster. Create an IAM role that has a policy that grants permission to the customer managed key. Associate the role with the EKS cluster.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：CD (55%) BD (42%) 2%。热门讨论与考点摘要：启用 EBS 默认加密并选择客户管理的密钥作为默认密钥是一种自动化解决方案，可减少运营开销。；为 EKS 集群创建 IAM 角色并授予对客户管理密钥的访问权限是启用加密而不增加额外操作开销的必要步骤。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: CD (55%) BD (42%) 2%. Popular discussion and key point summary: Enabling EBS default encryption and selecting customer-managed keys as default keys is an automated solution that reduces operational overhead.; Creating an IAM role for the EKS cluster and granting access to customer-managed keys are necessary steps to enable encryption without adding additional operational overhead.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要将 Oracle 数据库迁移到 AWS。该数据库由一个表组成，其中包含数百万个高分辨率的地理信息系统 (GIS) 图像，并通过地理代码进行识别。当自然灾送发生时，每隔几分钟就会更新数万张图像。每个地理代码都有一个与其关联的图像或行。该公司希望有一个在此类事件期间具有高可用性和可扩展性的解决方案。哪种解决方案最经济高效地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to migrate an Oracle database to AWS. The database consists of a single table that contains millions of geographic information systems (GIS) images that are high resolution and are identified by a geographic code. When a natural disaster occurs, tens of thousands of images get updated every few minutes. Each geographic code has a single image or row that is associated with it. The company wants a solution that is highly available and scalable during such events. Which solution meets these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 将图像和地理代码存储在数据库表中。使用在 Amazon RDS 多可用区数据库实例上运行的 Oracle。
A.en: Store the images and geographic codes in a database table. Use Oracle running on an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instance.

B.zh: 将图像存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。使用 Amazon DynamoDB，将地理代码作为键，将图像 S3 URL 作为值。
B.en: Store the images in Amazon S3 buckets. Use Amazon DynamoDB with the geographic code as the key and the image S3 URL as the value.

C.zh: 将图像和地理代码存储在 Amazon DynamoDB 表中。在高负载期间配置 DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX)。
C.en: Store the images and geographic codes in an Amazon DynamoDB table. Configure DynamoDB Accelerator (DAX) during times of high load.

D.zh: 将图像存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。将地理代码和图像 S3 URL 存储在数据库表中。使用在 Amazon RDS 多可用区数据库实例上运行的 Oracle。
D.en: Store the images in Amazon S3 buckets. Store geographic codes and image S3 URLs in a database table. Use Oracle running on an Amazon RDS Multi-AZ DB instance.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：在现成的数据库（例如Oracle）中存储大量高分辨率图像会导致存储成本高且性能差。错误：虽然 Amazon RDS 多可用区提供高可用性，但它不适合存储大量非结构化数据（例如图像）。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Storing large amounts of high-resolution images in an off-the-shelf database (such as Oracle) results in high storage costs and poor performance. Error: Although Amazon RDS Multi-AZ provides high availability, it is not suitable for storing large amounts of unstructured data (such as images).

B.zh: 正確。技术原因：Amazon S3 是一种高效且经济高效的存储解决方案，用于存储大量图像。正确：Amazon DynamoDB 是一种高度可用且可扩展的 NoSQL 数据库，适合存储地理代码和图像 URL 的映射。正确：该架构在高负载下可以快速扩展，同时保持成本效益。
B.en: Correct. Technical reason: Amazon S3 is an efficient and cost-effective storage solution for storing large amounts of images. Correct: Amazon DynamoDB is a highly available and scalable NoSQL database suitable for storing mappings of geographic codes and image URLs. Correct: This architecture scales quickly under high load while remaining cost-effective.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：DynamoDB不适合直接存储大量高分辨率图像，因为它的存储成本较高，并且性能不如S3。错误：虽然DAX可以提高DynamoDB的性能，但它并没有解决存储图像的成本。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: DynamoDB is not suitable for directly storing large amounts of high-resolution images because its storage costs are higher and its performance is not as good as S3. Error: Although DAX can improve the performance of DynamoDB, it does not solve the cost of storing images.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：该解决方案无法同时满足问题中的关键性能、可用性、安全性、成本或运维约束，因此不是最佳选择。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This solution cannot simultaneously meet the key performance, availability, security, cost or operation and maintenance constraints in the question, so it is not the best choice.

answer_text.zh: B. 将图像存储在 Amazon S3 存储桶中。使用 Amazon DynamoDB，将地理代码作为键，将图像 S3 URL 作为值。
answer_text.en: B. Store the images in Amazon S3 buckets. Use Amazon DynamoDB with the geographic code as the key and the image S3 URL as the value.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：B (71%) D (29%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：Amazon S3 是一种高效且经济高效的存储解决方案，用于存储大量图像。正确：Amazon DynamoDB 是一种高度可用且可扩展的 NoSQL 数据库，适合存储地理代码和图像 URL 的映射。正确：该架构在高负载下可以快速扩展，同时保持成本效益。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (71%) D (29%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon S3 is an efficient and cost-effective storage solution for storing large amounts of images. Correct: Amazon DynamoDB is a highly available and scalable NoSQL database suitable for storing mappings of geographic codes and image URLs. Correct: This architecture scales quickly under high load while remaining cost-effective.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一个应用程序，可以从汽车上的物联网传感器收集数据。数据通过 Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose 流式传输并存储在 Amazon S3 中。这些数据每年产生数万亿个 S3 对象。每天早上，该公司都会使用过去 30 天的数据重新训练一套机器学习 (ML) 模型。该公司每年四次使用前 12 个月的数据进行分析并训练其他机器学习模型。数据的可用时间必须最短，延迟时间最长为 1 年。一年后，数据必须保留以供存档。哪种存储解决方案最经济高效地满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company has an application that collects data from IoT sensors on automobiles. The data is streamed and stored in Amazon S3 through Amazon Kinesis Data Firehose. The data produces trillions of S3 objects each year. Each morning, the company uses the data from the previous 30 days to retrain a suite of machine learning (ML) models. Four times each year, the company uses the data from the previous 12 months to perform analysis and train other ML models. The data must be available with minimal delay for up to 1 year. After 1 year, the data must be retained for archival purposes. Which storage solution meets these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 使用 S3 智能分层存储类。创建 S3 生命周期策略以在 1 年后将对象过渡到 S3 Glacier Deep Archive。
A.en: Use the S3 Intelligent-Tiering storage class. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to transition objects to S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 1 year.

B.zh: 使用 S3 智能分层存储类。配置 S3 智能分层以在 1 年后自动将对象移至 S3 Glacier Deep Archive。
B.en: Use the S3 Intelligent-Tiering storage class. Configure S3 Intelligent-Tiering to automatically move objects to S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 1 year.

C.zh: 使用 S3 标准-不频繁访问（S3 标准-IA）存储类。创建 S3 生命周期策略以在 1 年后将对象过渡到 S3 Glacier Deep Archive。
C.en: Use the S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) storage class. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to transition objects to S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 1 year.

D.zh: 使用 S3 标准存储类别。创建 S3 生命周期策略，以在 30 天后将对象转换为 S3 标准-不频繁访问 (S3 标准-IA)，然后在 1 年后将对象转换为 S3 Glacier Deep Archive。
D.en: Use the S3 Standard storage class. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to transition objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 30 days, and then to S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 1 year.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：无需使用 S3 智能分层，因为数据访问模式很明确（30 天访问，此后访问较少）。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: There is no need to use S3 Intelligent-Tiering because the data access pattern is clear (30 days of access, less access after that).

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：S3智能分层不支持直接传输到S3 Glacier Deep Archive，成本优化不够。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: S3 Intelligent-Tiering does not support direct transfer to S3 Glacier Deep Archive, and the cost is not optimized enough.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：前 30 天的存储成本未优化，S3 标准存储未充分利用。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Storage costs for the first 30 days were not optimized and S3 Standard storage was not fully utilized.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：该选项充分利用S3存储类的特性，制定生命周期策略来实现成本优化。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: This option takes full advantage of the characteristics of S3 storage class and develops a life cycle strategy to achieve cost optimization.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 S3 标准存储类别。创建 S3 生命周期策略，以在 30 天后将对象转换为 S3 标准-不频繁访问 (S3 标准-IA)，然后在 1 年后将对象转换为 S3 Glacier Deep Archive。
answer_text.en: D. Use the S3 Standard storage class. Create an S3 Lifecycle policy to transition objects to S3 Standard-Infrequent Access (S3 Standard-IA) after 30 days, and then to S3 Glacier Deep Archive after 1 year.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (85%) Other。热门讨论与考点摘要：该选项充分利用S3存储类的特性，制定生命周期策略来实现成本优化。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (85%) Other. Popular discussion and key point summary: This option takes full advantage of the characteristics of S3 storage class and develops a life cycle strategy to achieve cost optimization.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在 us-east-1 区域内的三个独立的 VPC 中运行多个业务应用程序。应用程序必须能够在 VPC 之间进行通信。应用程序还必须能够每天持续将数百 GB 的数据发送到在单个本地数据中心运行的延迟敏感型应用程序。解决方案架构师需要设计一种能够最大限度提高成本效益的网络连接解决方​​案。哪种解决方案满足这些要求？
question_text.en: A company is running several business applications in three separate VPCs within the us-east-1 Region. The applications must be able to communicate between VPCs. The applications also must be able to consistently send hundreds of gigabytes of data each day to a latency-sensitive application that runs in a single on-premises data center. A solutions architect needs to design a network connectivity solution that maximizes cost-effectiveness. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 配置从数据中心到 AWS 的三个 AWS Site-to-Site VPN 连接。通过为每个 VPC 配置一个 VPN 连接来建立连接。
A.en: Configure three AWS Site-to-Site VPN connections from the data center to AWS. Establish connectivity by configuring one VPN connection for each VPC.

B.zh: 在每个 VPC 中启动第三方虚拟网络设备。在数据中心和每个虚拟设备之间建立 IPsec VPN 隧道。
B.en: Launch a third-party virtual network appliance in each VPC. Establish an IPsec VPN tunnel between the data center and each virtual appliance.

C.zh: 设置从数据中心到 us-east-1 中的 Direct Connect 网关的三个 AWS Direct Connect 连接。通过将每个 VPC 配置为使用 Direct Connect 连接之一来建立连接。
C.en: Set up three AWS Direct Connect connections from the data center to a Direct Connect gateway in us-east-1. Establish connectivity by configuring each VPC to use one of the Direct Connect connections.

D.zh: 设置一个从数据中心到 AWS 的 AWS Direct Connect 连接。创建中转网关，并将每个 VPC 附加到中转网关。在 Direct Connect 连接和中转网关之间建立连接。
D.en: Set up one AWS Direct Connect connection from the data center to AWS. Create a transit gateway, and attach each VPC to the transit gateway. Establish connectivity between the Direct Connect connection and the transit gateway.

A.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然站点到站点 VPN 可以实现连接，但它是一种基于 Internet 的解决方案，可能会导致更高的延迟和不稳定，特别是对于每天传输数百 GB 数据的延迟敏感型应用程序。从成本上来说，VPN的成本较低，但性能无法满足需求。
A.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While Site-to-Site VPN can achieve connectivity, it is an Internet-based solution that may result in higher latency and instability, especially for latency-sensitive applications that transfer hundreds of gigabytes of data per day. In terms of cost, the cost of VPN is lower, but the performance cannot meet the needs.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：这种方法很复杂并且需要额外的管理开销。第三方设备成本较高，且仍基于互联网连接，无法保证低延迟和高吞吐量。不符合“成本效益最大化”的要求。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: This approach is complex and requires additional management overhead. The cost of third-party equipment is higher and is still based on Internet connection, which cannot guarantee low latency and high throughput. Does not meet the requirement of "maximizing cost-effectiveness".

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然直连可以提供低延迟和高吞吐量，但建立三个独立的直连连接会显着增加成本，无法满足“成本效益最大化”的要求。专线网关可以支持多个VPC连接，因此无需为每个VPC设置单独的连接。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Although Direct Connect provides low latency and high throughput, setting up three independent Direct Connect connections significantly increases costs and does not meet the requirement of "maximizing cost effectiveness." Direct Connect Gateway can support multiple VPC connections, so there is no need to set up separate connections for each VPC.

D.zh: 正確。技术原因：专线连接具有低延迟和高吞吐量的特点，适合每天传输大量数据的场景。 Transit Gateway 可以连接多个 VPC，而 Direct Connect Gateway 可用于连接本地数据中心。该架构在满足性能要求的同时，简化了管理并降低了成本。满足“成本效益最大化”的要求。
D.en: Correct. Technical reason: Direct Connect provides low latency and high throughput, making it suitable for scenarios where large amounts of data are transferred every day. Transit Gateway can connect to multiple VPCs, and Direct Connect Gateway can be used to connect to local data centers. This architecture simplifies management and reduces costs while meeting performance requirements. Meet the requirement of "maximizing cost-effectiveness".

answer_text.zh: D. 设置一个从数据中心到 AWS 的 AWS Direct Connect 连接。创建中转网关，并将每个 VPC 附加到中转网关。在 Direct Connect 连接和中转网关之间建立连接。
answer_text.en: D. Set up one AWS Direct Connect connection from the data center to AWS. Create a transit gateway, and attach each VPC to the transit gateway. Establish connectivity between the Direct Connect connection and the transit gateway.

discussion.zh: 社区投票原始结果：D (100%)。热门讨论与考点摘要：专线连接具有低延迟和高吞吐量的特点，适合每天传输大量数据的场景。 Transit Gateway 可以连接多个 VPC，而 Direct Connect Gateway 可用于连接本地数据中心。该架构在满足性能要求的同时，简化了管理并降低了成本。满足“成本效益最大化”的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Direct Connect provides low latency and high throughput, making it suitable for scenarios where large amounts of data are transferred every day. Transit Gateway can connect to multiple VPCs, and Direct Connect Gateway can be used to connect to local data centers. This architecture simplifies management and reduces costs while meeting performance requirements. Meet the requirement of "maximizing cost-effectiveness".

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家电子商务公司正在构建一个分布式应用程序，其中涉及多个无服务器功能和 AWS 服务来完成订单处理任务。作为工作流程的一部分，这些任务需要手动批准。解决方案架构师需要为订单处理应用程序设计一个架构。该解决方案必须能够将多个 AWS Lambda 函数组合到响应式无服务器应用程序中。该解决方案还必须编排在 Amazon EC2 实例、容器或本地服务器上运行的数据和服务。哪种解决方案能够以最少的运营开销满足这些要求？
question_text.en: An ecommerce company is building a distributed application that involves several serverless functions and AWS services to complete order-processing tasks. These tasks require manual approvals as part of the workflow. A solutions architect needs to design an architecture for the order-processing application. The solution must be able to combine multiple AWS Lambda functions into responsive serverless applications. The solution also must orchestrate data and services that run on Amazon EC2 instances, containers, or on-premises servers. Which solution will meet these requirements with the LEAST operational overhead?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Step Functions 构建应用程序。
A.en: Use AWS Step Functions to build the application.

B.zh: 将所有应用程序组件集成到 AWS Glue 作业中。
B.en: Integrate all the application components in an AWS Glue job.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 构建应用程序。
C.en: Use Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) to build the application.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Lambda 函数和 Amazon EventBridge 事件构建应用程序。
D.en: Use AWS Lambda functions and Amazon EventBridge events to build the application.

A.zh: 正確。技术原因：AWS Step Functions 是一项与服务器无关的编排服务，可以轻松地将多个 AWS Lambda 函数和其他服务组合到强大的应用程序中。 Step Functions 支持自动化批处理，并且可以与 EC2 实例、主机和本地服务器集成。它提供可视化工作流程设计和状态管理，减少运营开销。
A.en: Correct. Technical reason: AWS Step Functions is a server-agnostic orchestration service that makes it easy to combine multiple AWS Lambda functions and other services into powerful applications. Step Functions supports automated batch processes and can be integrated with EC2 instances, hosts, and local servers. It provides visual workflow design and status management, reducing operational overhead.

B.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：AWS Glue 主要用于 ETL（提取、转换、加载）任务，适合处理数据转换和分析，而不是编排和分发应用程序。不支持灵活的批处理，不适合跨服务编排。
B.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: AWS Glue is mainly used for ETL (extract, transform, load) tasks and is suitable for handling data conversion and analysis, rather than orchestrating and distributing applications. It does not support flexible batch processes and is not suitable for cross-service orchestration.

C.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：Amazon SQS 是一种解耦队列服务，适用于解耦组件和异步通信，但不支持复杂的工作流编排。自动化批处理和跨服务编排需要额外的逻辑和服务支持，从而增加运营开销。
C.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: Amazon SQS is a decoupling queue service that is suitable for decoupled components and asynchronous communication, but does not support complex workflow orchestration. Automating batch processes and cross-service orchestration requires additional logic and service support, increasing operational overhead.

D.zh: 錯誤。技术原因：虽然 Lambda 和 EventBridge 可以处理事件驱动的架构，但它们不提供内置的工作流编排功能。与批处理过程互操作需要额外的开发工作并增加运营开销。
D.en: Incorrect. Technical reason: While Lambda and EventBridge can handle event-driven architectures, they do not provide built-in workflow orchestration capabilities. Interoperating with the batch process requires additional development work and increases operational overhead.

answer_text.zh: A. 使用 AWS Step Functions 构建应用程序。
answer_text.en: A. Use AWS Step Functions to build the application.
